nasb.text: For every high priest is appointed to offer both gifts and sacrifices; so it is necessary that this high priest also have something to offer.

esv.text: For every high priest is appointed to offer gifts and sacrifices; thus it is necessary for this priest also to have something to offer.

cnv.text: 所有大祭司都是為了獻禮物和祭品而設立的，所以這位大祭司，也必須有所獻上的。

ccb.text: 所有的大祭司都是为了向上帝献礼物和祭物而设立的，因此我们这位大祭司也必须有所献上。

csbs.text: 每一位大祭司受委任，都是为了献上礼物和祭物；故此，这一位也必须有所献上。
